zh.title: 2062未来人预言全集 - 日本2ch论坛穿越者预言与验证 | 2062 Future Man
zh.description: 2062未来人于2010年在日本2ch论坛自称来自2062年，留下了关于日本大地震、国际局势、科技发展等30条预言的完整收录与验证分析。曾在311大地震前两天再次现身。
zh.keywords: 2062未来人,2062年,未来人,2ch,时间旅行,日本预言,311地震预言,未来穿越者
zh.ogTitle: 2062未来人预言全集 | 2062 Future Man Predictions
zh.ogDescription: 日本2ch论坛穿越者2062未来人的30条预言完整收录与验证分析。涵盖自然灾害、国际关系、科技发展等领域。
zh.twitterDescription: 30条来自2062年穿越者的预言，含真实度验证。曾在311大地震前两天再次现身2ch论坛。

en.title: 2062 Future Man Predictions - Time Traveler from Japanese 2ch Forum | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: The '2062 Future Man' appeared on Japan's 2ch forum in 2010 claiming to be from 2062. Complete archive of 30 predictions covering earthquakes, geopolitics, and technology, with real-world verification. Notably reappeared 2 days before the 2011 Tohoku earthquake.
en.keywords: 2062 Future Man,2062未来人,2ch time traveler,Japan predictions,Tohoku earthquake prediction,future man 2ch
en.ogTitle: 2062 Future Man - Time Traveler from Japanese 2ch
en.ogDescription: 30 predictions from the 2062 Future Man who appeared on Japan's 2ch forum. Reappeared 2 days before the 2011 Tohoku earthquake.
en.twitterDescription: 30 predictions from Japan's 2062 Future Man. Reappeared on 2ch just 2 days before the 2011 Tohoku earthquake.
